response.justification: The candidate is a strong hands-on senior/staff engineer with roughly 19 years of broad experience, meeting the raw tenure and degree minimums, but the profile does not match a director-level principal role centered on AI strategy. His AI exposure is recent and tooling-focused (MCP generators, agent infrastructure since 2025) rather than recognized expertise with shipped AI products or platforms, and there is no evidence of organization-level technical leadership, strategic advisory work with customers, or cloud platform strategy at the scope this role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform
Active knowledge-sharing via conference talks, workshops, and open-source libraries
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI-powered products beyond recent agent-tooling contributions
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work, with no principal- or director-level strategic leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no visible cloud platform strategy experience at scale

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap vs. director-level strategic scope
Meets 15-year experience minimum with entrepreneurial background
